address_system: Every location = a clock time (direction) + a concentric street (distance from the Man). Clock avenues span the 2:00–10:00 arc; the 12:00 axis is left open as the sightline from Center Camp through the Man to the Temple and deep playa. Streets from the center outward: Esplanade (innermost), then A–K. E.g. '7:30 & Esplanade' or '3:00 & Delphi'.
street_theme_note: The 2026 concentric streets are named for world-centers — sacred trees and holy mountains (Ararat, Bodhi tree, Ceiba, Delphi, Great Oak, Iroko…). The city is itself an Axis Mundi this year, which is the deck's whole spine.

the_man.directions: Center of the open playa — walk toward the Man on the 12:00 axis.

temple.directions: Straight out past the Man on the 12:00 axis, at the far edge of the open playa.

center_camp.directions: At the mouth of the city, 6:00 & Esplanade — opposite the open playa.

esplanade.directions: The innermost ring road, facing the open playa — prime frontage.

deep_playa.directions: The open dark expanse beyond the Man toward 12:00, running out to the fence.

trash_fence.directions: The pentagon fence at the very edge of the city (~7.5 mi around). Walk outward on any avenue until you hit it.

airport.directions: Out past the residential streets on the 5:00 side.

greeters.directions: The city entrance — where you're welcomed home and handed the map.

sunrise_soundcamp.directions: Out in deep playa toward 12:00 — Robot Heart and the sunrise art cars park in the open past the Esplanade. Follow the crowd and the bass before dawn.

daytime_soundcamp.directions: The loud outer corners near 2:00 and 10:00, on the outer letter streets — where amplified sound is zoned.

big_art.directions: On the open playa between the Esplanade and the Man, and scattered out in deep playa beyond the Man.

citywide.directions: This one isn't a place — it happens all over the city. Bring it wherever you are.

roaming.directions: A mutant vehicle — it roams. No fixed address; catch it as it passes, usually deep playa at night.
